ready.title: Ready to Invoice
ready.description: Review recurring due work and generate draft invoices for the selected periods.
ready.selectAllExplanation: Select parent groups or individual rows to control invoice generation.

reverse.title: Reverse Recurring Invoice
reverse.warning: Reversing this invoice will remove the generated draft and associated recurring selections.
reverse.description: You are about to reverse the recurring invoice for:

effects.deleteDraft: Delete the generated recurring invoice draft
effects.reissueCredits: Reissue any credits that were applied to that invoice
effects.unmarkRecords: Unmark linked time entries and usage records as invoiced
effects.retireBridge: Retire the linked client cadence bridge record and reopen the linked recurring service periods
effects.reopenPeriods: Reopen the linked recurring service periods without requiring client-cycle bridge metadata

delete.title: Permanently Delete Recurring Invoice?
delete.bridgeDeleted: The linked client cadence bridge record will also be deleted.
delete.bridgeReopened: Linked recurring service periods will be reopened without requiring client-cycle bridge metadata.

preview.title: Invoice Preview
preview.description: This is a preview of how the invoice will look when finalized.
preview.summaryCombined: This selection will generate one combined invoice.
preview.summarySeparate: This selection will generate {{count}} separate invoices.
preview.generateError: Failed to generate invoice from preview

poOverage.title: Purchase Order Limit Overages
poOverage.description: The selected invoice total is over by {{amount}}.
poOverage.batchDescription: One or more invoices would exceed a Purchase Order authorized amount. What do you want to do?
poOverage.skipInvoices: Skip invoices that would overrun their PO
poOverage.singleDescription: This invoice would exceed the Purchase Order authorized amount by {{amount}}.
poOverage.skippedError: Skipped due to PO overage ({{poLabel}}): over by {{amount}}.

materializationGap.title: Recurring service period repair required
materializationGap.description: These client-cadence windows are missing persisted recurring service periods, so they are blocked from ready-to-invoice work until the canonical schedule is repaired.
materializationGap.helpText: Repair the canonical service-period records instead of generating a compatibility invoice row.

errors.title: Errors occurred while finalizing invoices:
errors.loadReady: Failed to load billing periods. Please try again.
errors.loadHistory: Failed to load recurring invoice history. Please try again.

manualInvoices.title: Generate Manual Invoice
manualInvoices.detailsDescription: Manual edits stay periodless by default, while recurring detail-backed lines keep their canonical service periods.
manualInvoices.description: Create a manual invoice and optionally include automated recurring items.

prepayment.label: This is a prepayment invoice (creates credit)
prepayment.description: Mark this only when the manual invoice should create credit for future financial application instead of representing recurring service-period coverage.

creditExpiration.label: Credit Expiration Date
creditExpiration.helpText: Leave blank for no expiration or to use default expiration period

errors.invoiceNumberUnique: This invoice number is already in use.
errors.noTaxRateConfigured: No tax rate configured for the region.
errors.refresh: An error occurred while refreshing invoice data.

empty.title: No Draft Invoices
empty.description: Draft invoices will appear here once you create invoices that have not been finalized.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load draft invoices. Please try again.
errors.finalizeFailed: Failed to finalize invoice. Please try again.
errors.bulkFinalizeFailed: Failed to finalize selected invoices. Please try again.
errors.pdfFailed: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.
errors.reverseFailed: Failed to reverse draft invoice(s). Please try again.

reverseDialog.title: Reverse Draft Invoice
reverseDialog.message_one: Reversing this draft invoice will delete it and release any linked time entries or usage records. This action cannot be undone.
reverseDialog.message_other: Reversing {{count}} draft invoices will delete them and release any linked time entries or usage records. This action cannot be undone.

empty.title: No Finalized Invoices
empty.description: Finalize draft invoices to see them here.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load invoices. Please try again.
errors.pdfFailed: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.
errors.bulkPdfFailed: Failed to generate PDFs. Please try again.
errors.unfinalizeFailed: Failed to unfinalize invoice. Please try again.
errors.bulkUnfinalizeFailed: Failed to unfinalize invoices. Please try again.

recurringServicePeriods.title: Recurring Service Periods
recurringServicePeriods.description: Review recurring invoice coverage windows for a client contract line, troubleshoot why work is or is not due, and inspect billed history linked to invoice detail rows.

fields.scheduleKeyPlaceholder: Paste a schedule key (optional if selected above)

errors.enterScheduleKey: Enter a schedule key to inspect recurring service periods.
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load recurring service periods.
errors.candidateRecordsArray: Candidate records JSON must be an array.
errors.previewFailed: Failed to preview recurring service-period regeneration.
errors.repairFailed: Failed to repair recurring service-period materialization.

values.noConflicts: No regeneration conflicts were detected for the supplied candidates.

generated.label: Generated
generated.detail: Matches the current cadence rules and is awaiting billing or review.

edited.label: Edited
edited.detail: A later revision changed the generated schedule and remains active.

skipped.label: Skipped
skipped.detail: This future period is intentionally excluded from due selection until re-edited.

locked.label: Locked
locked.detail: This period is frozen for ordinary edits while awaiting billing or correction.

superseded.label: Superseded
superseded.detail: A newer revision replaced this period and this row remains for audit history.

archived.label: Archived
archived.detail: This historical row is retained only for audit and reconciliation.

provenanceReasons.defer: Deferred to a later invoice window

repairPanel.title: Missing persisted service periods
repairPanel.description: This recurring schedule exists in live billing metadata but has no persisted service-period rows. Repair will materialize future rows only, preserve billed history boundaries, and stamp the new records with backfill provenance.
repairPanel.result: Backfilled {{backfilled}} rows, realigned {{realigned}}, skipped {{skipped}} historical candidates, and left {{active}} active rows on this schedule.

regenerationPreview.title: Regeneration Preview
regenerationPreview.description: Paste candidate records JSON to preview how preserved edited or billed rows would conflict with regenerated future candidates for this schedule.

reasons.missing_candidate: No regenerated candidate remains for this preserved override slot.
reasons.service_period_mismatch: The regenerated candidate no longer matches the preserved override service-period boundary.
reasons.invoice_window_mismatch: The regenerated candidate no longer matches the preserved override invoice window.
reasons.activity_window_mismatch: The regenerated candidate no longer matches the preserved override activity window.

billingCycles.title: Billing Cycles
billingCycles.tooltip: Configure client billing schedules and preview the invoice windows they create for client-cadence recurring services.
billingCycles.description: Client billing schedules define invoice windows for recurring lines that invoice on the client billing schedule. Contract-anniversary lines can follow their own cadence and are not previewed here.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to fetch data. Please try again later.

alerts.codeReadonly: Code view is read-only for this template.

errors.setDefaultFailed: Failed to set template as default.

externalTax.title: External Tax Import
externalTax.description: Review invoices waiting for external tax calculation and import the resulting amounts.

empty.allUpToDate: All invoices are up to date

externalTax.helpText: Imported external tax amounts are written back to invoice detail rows for reconciliation and export.

alerts.pendingDescription: Tax has been requested from the external accounting system and is awaiting import.

sendEmail.title: Send Invoice Email

recipients.title: Recipients
recipients.notConfigured: No email address is configured for this invoice.

fields.additionalMessagePlaceholder: Add an optional note to the invoice email.

sendEmail.preview: The invoice PDF will be attached to the generated email.

descriptions.automatic: Generate draft invoices from ready recurring service periods and due work.
descriptions.manual: Create a one-off invoice with manual line items and optional automated charges.
descriptions.prepayment: Create a prepayment invoice or credit memo for future value.
Prepayment invoices create client credit for future value. They do not create recurring service periods; later recurring invoices keep their own service-period coverage.
descriptions.creditMemo: Credit memos adjust financial balances without redefining recurring service-period coverage on the source invoice.

errors.creditMemosUnsupported: Credit memos are not yet supported

tooltips.internal: Tax calculated by Alga PSA based on configured tax rates
tooltips.external: Tax calculated by external accounting system
tooltips.pending: Tax awaiting import from external accounting system
